intended_use: The EarliPoint System is intended for use by healthcare providers to objectively diagnose and assess children for ASD using software algorithm to analyze a child's response to an external stimulus in
intended_use_full: The EarliPoint System is intended for use by healthcare providers to objectively diagnose and assess children for ASD using software algorithm to analyze a child's response to an external stimulus in the form of videos.
ground_truth: Expert clinician diagnosis using current best practice for ASD diagnosis; correlation against ADOS-2 and Mullen validated instruments
other_metrics: For mITD (n=475): Sensitivity 95% CI 64.6%-76.9%, Specificity 95% CI 75.3%-85.4%. For CertainDx (n=335): Sensitivity 95% CI 70.5%-84.3%, Specificity 95% CI 79.5%-90.2%. Three EarliPoint Severity Indices (Social Disability Index, Verbal Ability Index, Non-verbal Ability Index) correlated against ADOS-2 and Mullen instruments.
